creator: yuanjue@FreeBSD.org
text:
upgrade /mail/kcheckgmail port to 0.5.7.

The author of KCheckGmail replaced automake with unsermake in Release 0.5.7, which makes the port somewhat dirty if porting directly. Therefore I regenerate the build system with automake to make the port more neatly. The author said he would change back to automake in next release.

Fix: ===> Generating patch
===> Viewing diff with more
